scene_title: The capital wakes behind its walls
scene_purpose: Establish Madurai as an organised capital
emotional_turn: The travellers enter a city that appears capable of order

scene_purpose: Make the anklet sale economically plausible
emotional_turn: Opportunity appears inside a network Kōvalaṉ does not know

scene_purpose: Transfer protection from Kauṇṭi to a pastoral household
emotional_turn: Kaṇṇaki receives one final domestic refuge

scene_purpose: Let the household perceive disturbance through ordinary work
emotional_turn: Several practical failures create shared unease

scene_purpose: Show performance acting upon collective fear
emotional_turn: The community tries to restore order through coordinated song

scene_title: Kōvalaṉ carries the surviving capital alone
scene_purpose: Expose Kōvalaṉ's lack of local protection
emotional_turn: The recovery object also reveals his isolation

scene_title: The goldsmith converts expertise into deception
scene_purpose: Show specialised credibility manufacturing a suspect
emotional_turn: A sale becomes a criminal classification

scene_purpose: Centre the catastrophe on institutional haste
emotional_turn: State force moves faster than evidence or speech

scene_title: Kōvalaṉ is killed as a classified body
scene_purpose: Make correction impossible through wrongful execution
emotional_turn: The recovery plan ends in irreversible state violence

scene_title: The city cry breaks the dance
scene_purpose: Transfer narrative agency from Kōvalaṉ to Kaṇṇaki
emotional_turn: Communal repair collapses into public death news

scene_purpose: Move grief toward a claim about government
emotional_turn: Private bereavement becomes public injustice

scene_title: The anklet becomes a public claim
scene_purpose: Turn private property into visible civic evidence
emotional_turn: Citizens begin judging the ruler through Kaṇṇaki's suffering

scene_title: The crowd leads her to the body
scene_purpose: Make the public witness what royal procedure produced
emotional_turn: Abstract accusation becomes a bloodied body

scene_purpose: Transform lament into chosen legal action
emotional_turn: Kaṇṇaki leaves the body because authority must answer

scene_title: The queen dreams the symbols of collapse
scene_purpose: Let palace symbols register danger without knowledge
emotional_turn: Royal confidence becomes internally unsettled

scene_title: The gate receives a claimant, not a petitioner
scene_purpose: Collide ceremonial order with an evidence-bearing outsider
emotional_turn: The gatekeeper must transmit an accusation against the king

scene_purpose: Make identity and economic context part of the claim
emotional_turn: The court must hear Kōvalaṉ as a merchant husband, not an anonymous thief

scene_purpose: Reduce the dispute to a testable material difference
emotional_turn: Sovereign certainty becomes vulnerable to inspection

scene_purpose: Let evidence defeat wrongful classification
emotional_turn: The gem impact makes the court's error public and undeniable

scene_purpose: Complete political judgement without pretending repair
emotional_turn: Royal authority collapses while Kaṇṇaki's loss remains

scene_purpose: Place her claim inside inherited public memory
emotional_turn: Personal truth is measured against remembered ordeals

scene_title: The vow includes ruler and city
scene_purpose: Expand judgement from one king to the civic order
emotional_turn: Courtroom proof becomes a city-level sentence

scene_title: Three circuits and the embodied accusation
scene_purpose: Make judgement spatial, public and bodily
emotional_turn: Kaṇṇaki's wounded body becomes the medium of accusation

scene_purpose: Preserve sacred action while fixing protected categories
emotional_turn: Catastrophe receives explicit moral limits

scene_title: Fire chooses rather than merely spreads
scene_purpose: Establish selective fire as the governing destruction rule
emotional_turn: The city begins burning under bounded but terrifying judgement

scene_purpose: Show collapse of the whole governing environment
emotional_turn: Ordinary procedures and sacred protections cease to function

scene_purpose: Shift from collective catastrophe to city-deity encounter
emotional_turn: Madurai gains a speaking representative only after human failure

scene_purpose: Hold karma and immediate political responsibility together
emotional_turn: Kaṇṇaki receives context but no restitution

scene_purpose: Give sacred transition bodily duration
emotional_turn: The public accuser moves beyond ordinary civic presence

scene_purpose: Close the justice-state arc and hand memory to hill witnesses
emotional_turn: Direct civic action becomes testimony others will carry
